Author: You
Name: Bisme
Punchline: Export your equipped gear + materia as JSON for xivgear / Bis Meld Optimizer.
Description: Exports your currently equipped gear with all materia and the active class job. Output is compatible with xivgear.app's import format and the FFXIV Bis Meld Optimizer HTML app. Use /bisme to print to chat, save to file, or copy to clipboard.
